name: Licking' Good Beef Steak
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cooked broad noodles OR 2 cups Cooked rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steak into serving size pieces.
2. Brown on both sides in 3 tablespoons oil, to which you have added lemon slices.
3. Remove steak to a pan large enough to bake it.
4. Layer onions and garlic over the meat.
5. Sprinkle flour over top.
6. Combine bouillon, beer, sugar, parsley flakes, thyme, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl.
7. Pour the mixture over the steak.
8. Bake uncovered at 325 degrees for 3 hours.
9. Serve over cooked broad noodles or cooked rice.
10. Garnish with green pepper slices, fresh parsley, and cherry tomatoes.
11. Serves 5 - 6.
